request.description:
StartFragmentGET API to retrieve schools sorted by nearest distance.

Example Request:  
GET /listSchools?latitude=28.6139&longitude=77.2090EndFragment

StartFragmentPOST API to add a new school into the database.  
  
Example Request:  
{  
"name": "Test School",  
"address": "123 Main Street",  
"latitude": 28.6139,  
"longitude": 77.2090  
}  
  
Expected Response:  
{  
"success": true,  
"message": "School added successfully"  
}EndFragment
